steps.t: Avri has asked you to check the crab traps she placed at Lithengris. Lithengris is located south-east of Sadrech's Camp.
None of the crab traps held any crabs. You should check the last crab trap at Lithengris.
You have recovered a bucket full of crabs from the Corsair. You should give it to Avri at Sadrech's Camp.
